query:
INSERT INTO
                tachyon_apps_compute.environment_variables
            (id, app_id, env_key, encrypted_value, target,
             is_secret, created_at, updated_at)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
            encrypted_value = VALUES(encrypted_value),
            is_secret = VALUES(is_secret),
            updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
